description: Trigger discrimination for the broad citation-AGE/staleness sweep (this skill) vs tracking specific framework EDITIONS (framework-edition-tracker), proposing mapping edits (framework-mapping-refresher), and reviewing skill QUALITY (skill-quality-reviewer).

cases.prompt: Sweep every skill that cites an external source and flag anything stale, broken, or superseded — by age and volatility — for re-verification.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — a broad, age/volatility-based staleness sweep across all external citations is this skill. Not edition-specific and not a quality review.
cases.reason: Auditing citation currency broadly and flagging for re-verification is this skill's core scope.

cases.prompt: Track the specific edition of each cited standard and produce a delta when a newer edition ships.
cases.note: SEAM CASE — narrow, edition-specific tracking with deltas is framework-edition-tracker; this is the broad staleness sweep.
cases.reason: framework-edition-tracker focuses on standard editions and their deltas. This skill sweeps ALL external citations by age/volatility.

cases.prompt: Given the edition delta, propose the specific changes to the affected skills and references.
cases.reason: framework-mapping-refresher proposes concrete mapping edits. This skill only flags stale citations for re-verification; it proposes no edits.

cases.prompt: Review this skill for trigger quality, section substance, and eval integrity.
cases.reason: skill-quality-reviewer judges a skill's overall quality. This skill audits only whether its external citations are current.
